measurements.claim: The tenth-wave arXiv intake captured 39 retained source-lead rows across five Gather stores for quantum, materials/energy, climate AI, neuroscience AI, and formal verification AI.
evidence: docs/outreach/receipts/tenth-wave/arxiv-quantum-frontier/catalog.jsonl has 8 rows
docs/outreach/receipts/tenth-wave/arxiv-materials-energy/catalog.jsonl has 8 rows
docs/outreach/receipts/tenth-wave/arxiv-climate-ai/catalog.jsonl has 8 rows
docs/outreach/receipts/tenth-wave/arxiv-neuro-ai/catalog.jsonl has 8 rows
docs/outreach/receipts/tenth-wave/arxiv-formal-verification-ai/catalog.jsonl has 7 rows
total retained rows is 39

measurements.claim: The tenth-wave source-router package explicitly maps five frontier lanes into next proof-packet candidates without treating metadata as scientific truth.
evidence: docs/outreach/TENTH-WAVE-CROSS-DOMAIN-EXPERIMENT-ROUTER-2026-07-02.md has Purpose section listing five frontier lanes
same package has Immediate Experiments table for formal replay, climate uncertainty, quantum scheduling, materials benchmark, and brain/AI boundary packets
same package says the result is not AI solved science and that rows are SOURCE_LEAD

measurements.claim: The tenth-wave source-router demotion gate covers all 39 retained arXiv rows and classifies them into 24 domain leads, 10 adjacent leads, and 5 query-noise rows.
evidence: docs/outreach/receipts/tenth-wave/source-router-demotion-gate.json has schema project-telos.tenth-wave-source-router/v1
demotion gate has 39 rows
demotion gate summary records 24 domain_lead rows
demotion gate summary records 10 adjacent_lead rows
demotion gate summary records 5 query_noise rows

measurements.claim: The tenth-wave package identifies duplicate source IDs across lanes and treats duplication as routing signal rather than extra paper truth.
evidence: docs/outreach/receipts/tenth-wave/source-router-demotion-gate.json lists duplicate IDs 2512.03307v1, 2501.02842v1, and 2604.11487v1
docs/outreach/TENTH-WAVE-CROSS-DOMAIN-EXPERIMENT-ROUTER-2026-07-02.md says repeated general rows are useful query-layer signal and not domain evidence by themselves

measurements.claim: The tenth-wave official-copy draft keeps quantum, climate, materials, neuroscience, theorem-replay, hardware, and wet-lab claims unverified until domain-specific proof packets exist.
evidence: docs/research/whitepapers/CROSS-DOMAIN-EXPERIMENT-ROUTERS-2026-07-02.md states evidence boundary excludes new scientific laws, theorem proofs, hardware results, climate-model validation, neuroscience truth, materials discovery, and official archive acceptance
same draft says any quantum, materials, climate, neuroscience, or theorem-proving result is UNVERIFIABLE in this packet
same draft says publication readiness requires at least one source-body lane converted into a domain-specific proof packet with a verifier receipt

measurements.claim: The tenth-wave content queue includes explicit do-not-post boundaries against solved-domain and exhaustive-literature claims.
evidence: docs/outreach/TENTH-WAVE-CONTENT-QUEUE-2026-07-02.md includes a Do Not Post section

same queue forbids claiming Telos solved quantum computing, discovered new materials, validated a climate model, proved neuroscience truth, replayed a theorem without a local replay receipt, or produced latest/exhaustive source coverage
